title: senecio × bujedoanus
intro: Senecio × bujedoanus, also known as Bujed's ragwort, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Senecio × bujedoanus include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
